character.definition: (corrupted form of 囂) looks big outside but empty inside, to yell; voice of anger, hubbub; clamour
(variant of 耜) a farming instrument; a spade; a shovel
to discard, to abandon, to die; death
cakes, (same as 餬) congee; porridge; gruel
(same as 鮛) a small kind of tuna or sturgeon
stiff, hard clay or rocky strata; crack in a jar
